stage_identity.evidence: Byte is a round blue blob with gangly teen legs, sitting on a chair at the desk. Proportions match teen stage - compact round body, clearly teen limbs, big expressive eyes. Identity maintained from base.

pixel_style.evidence: Clean pixel art throughout - dithered shading on walls, pixelated laptop form, blocky shelf, pixel-art food bowl. No painterly or photoreal rendering visible.

requested_changes_visible.evidence: Byte's head is tilted upward and eyes are wide/surprised-looking, gazing toward the trophy shelf above. The warm golden afternoon light is clearly visible as a warm amber glow in the room and on the window/Chicago skyline. Both requested deltas are visible.

artifact_free.evidence: No garbled text, floating glyphs, or malformed anatomy detected. Byte's limbs are clean, no duplicated body parts, no smear artifacts.

prop_layout_integrity.evidence: Exactly 1 golden trophy on the left side of the shelf. Exactly 1 green plant on the right side of the shelf. Clear spacing between trophy and plant with no overlap. Exactly 1 food bowl on the floor to the right of desk. Bowl and desk legs have clear spacing with no overlap or clipping.

anchors_present.evidence: Wooden desk present in mid-ground. Oversized laptop open on desk with glowing screen. Chicago skyline clearly visible through a simple window on the left side. All three anchors intact.

temporal_mood_match.evidence: Warm golden amber afternoon lighting matches time_of_day=afternoon. Byte's wide-eyed upward gaze conveys ecstatic admiration consistent with mood=ecstatic and happiness=97.8%. No sleeping or night indicators present which would conflict with is_sleeping=false.

reground_cleanup.evidence: Not applicable - mode is normal, not reground. No reground cleanup required.
